title: Learn To Tell The Time Clock Childrens Educational Learning Toy
features: Will help you to teach your child or school class to tell the time
The clock face is marked with 5 minute intervals making it easier for the child to learn
Also shows quarter past, quarter to, half past and o' clock
Comes with a hanging cord so that it can be easily displayed in a playroom, child's bedroom or classroom
Diameter of clock face is 17.5 cm
description: Product Description This fun owl clock is a great way to introduce telling the time to your little ones. With a bright design and moveable hands its perfect for hanging in any kids bedroom familiarising them with reading the time. Safety Warning Contains Small Parts Box Contains 1 x owl shaped cardboard clock See more
